Common University Entrance Test – Underg.official_note: Official NTA CUET-UG site (scorecard/result portal). NTA does NOT publish cutoffs and there is no centralized CUET-UG counselling — each participating university releases its own course/category-wise cutoff & merit list. No single official cutoff page exists; this is the authoritative result domain. (cuetug.ntaonline.in is only a registration/counselling-services portal.)

Company Secretary Executive Entrance Tes.official_note: CSEET is a qualifying exam with fixed pass marks (min 40% per paper, 50% aggregate) — there is NO rank-based cutoff or merit-list cutoff. This is the official ICSI exam-results hub (links to e-marks statement and the 'Qualifying marks for CS Examinations' doc); closest official artifact.

Consortium of Medical Engineering and De.official_note: Official COMEDK engineering closing/cutoff ranks PDF after Round 1 allotment (notified 28.07.2025); fetched a live 1.1MB PDF from comedk.org. The previous URL (engineering-cutoff-ranks.pdf) is dead (404). COMEDK publishes a fresh round-wise/year-wise PDF each cycle under comedk.org/uploads/.

Delhi Common Entrance Test for Polytechn.official_note: Official NIC CET-Delhi (DTTE, Govt of NCT Delhi) counselling/result/seat-allotment portal where polytechnic allotment & closing ranks are published. Connection refused at fetch time (seasonal portal active around June results), but confirmed as the correct official domain by the DTTE page tte.delhi.gov.in/tte/common-entrance-test.

Footwear Design and Development Institut.official_note: Official FDDI admission-process page (live). FDDI publishes an AIST Common Merit List (CML) and runs online counselling here / via admissions.fddiindia.com — no separate rank-cutoff page. The previous URL (/admission-new/) returns 404.

Gujarat Common Entrance Test.official_note: Official Gujarat ACPC (Admission Committee for Professional Courses, DTE Gujarat) eCounselling portal for GUJCET-based BE/B.Tech admissions; merit list and Round-wise opening/closing-rank cutoffs are published here (also acpc.gujarat.gov.in). Cutoff/merit links appear after candidate login / in Activity Board.

Gujarat Common Entrance Test – Medical a.official_note: Official ACPUGMEC (Admission Committee for Professional UG Medical Courses, Gujarat) portal — publishes category-wise merit lists, round-wise rank/institute-wise allotment results and last-rank cutoffs for MBBS/BDS/BAMS/BHMS. (Note: medical admission is NEET-based; pharmacy degree admission in Gujarat is actually handled by ACPC at gujacpc.admissions.nic.in.)
